description_long: This is a compact, single-story urban house with a modern, minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of white and light tan walls, with large black-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. A small balcony with a metal railing extends from one side, accessible through a sliding glass door. The interior layout includes a kitchen, dining area, and what appears to be a bathroom, all visible through the open plan and large windows. The roof is flat, and the overall structure is boxy with clean, straight lines. The house is designed for efficient use of space and urban living, with a focus on functionality and simplicity.
description: A modern, single-story urban house with large black-framed windows, a flat roof, and a small balcony. The exterior is finished in white and tan, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the open-plan kitchen and dining area, with large windows and a sliding door leading to the balcony.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the entry door and a side window, with the bathroom area partially visible.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear of the house, showing a mostly solid wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the balcony, large windows, and the tan brick exterior, providing a clear look at the main living space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Sliding glass door with direct access to a small balcony, no porch or overhang, minimalist style
